summary: The diff updates ConnectBotWizardModal key generation to use only the Web Crypto API and adds helper functions, but it does not implement the required TweetNaCl-preferred Ed25519 generation with @noble/ed25519 fallback, nor does it add TweetNaCl as a dependency. It also modifies additional files beyond the requested component.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a real Ed25519 keypair preferring TweetNaCl (nacl.sign.keyPair), otherwise @noble/ed25519, otherwise Web Crypto API Ed25519; when using TweetNaCl store publicKey as Uint8Array(32) and private key as hex of the 64-byte secretKey.
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation shown uses only Web Crypto API key generation and does not import or use TweetNaCl or @noble/ed25519, so the specified preference/fallback chain and TweetNaCl-specific handling are not implemented.
evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx (handleGenerateKeypair uses window.crypto.subtle.generateKey/exportKey; no tweetnacl/@noble usage present in shown diff)

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace only the existing handleGenerateKeypair logic with the specified Ed25519 generation flow; keep all other wizard logic/steps unchanged; keep publicKey as Uint8Array and private key displayed as hex derived from generation output.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff adds/changes code outside of handleGenerateKeypair (new helper functions base64UrlToUint8Array and bytesToHex at module scope). This violates the 'only handleGenerateKeypair logic is changed' acceptance criterion. Also, the specified generation flow (TweetNaCl preferred, noble fallback) is not implemented.
evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx (adds base64UrlToUint8Array and bytesToHex helpers outside handleGenerateKeypair)

missing_requirements.requirement: If TweetNaCl is not present, add it as a frontend dependency so `import nacl from 'tweetnacl'` compiles and runs; no unrelated dependency updates.
missing_requirements.reason: No dependency manifest changes are shown, and the component does not import `tweetnacl`, so there is no evidence TweetNaCl was added or used.
evidence: File diff summary shows only 3 modified files; no package.json/yarn.lock/pnpm-lock changes are listed

hallucinated_features.description: Modified additional non-target files unrelated to the Ed25519 keypair generation fix (frontend-file-summaries.txt and project_state.json).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest constrains changes to what is strictly necessary for the key generation fix (dependency manifests allowed only if required for TweetNaCl). These metadata/state files are not requested and do not appear necessary to implement key generation.
